app.subtitle: Attack Surface Intelligence Engine
input.label: Target domain
mode.label: Mode
lang.label: Language
detail.title: Asset Details
detail.select: Select a row to see its details.
hint.domain: Type the domain you want to analyze (no http://). Example: example.com
hint.scan: Start mapping this domain's attack surface.
hint.cancel: Stop the running scan. Partial results are kept on screen.
hint.mode: Passive = public sources only (safe, never touches the target). Full = adds brute force & active checks (needs authorization).
hint.export: Save results as an HTML report, JSON data, or CSV table.
hint.newscan: Clear results and start analyzing a new domain.
hint.open: Reopen a previously saved scan result (.json file).
hint.save: Save the full scan result so you can reopen it later.
hint.exporthtml: A clean single-file report to share or print.
hint.exportcsv: A table you can open in Excel/Spreadsheets.
hint.settings: Configure concurrency, timeouts, output folder, and risk weights.
hint.theme: Switch between dark and light appearance.
hint.updates: Check whether a newer version is available.
log.domain_intel: Fetching DNS, RDAP, and the apex certificate.
log.wildcard: Wildcard DNS detected - brute-force results will be filtered.
log.capped: Asset count capped to {n} to preserve performance.
wildcard.banner: Wildcard DNS detected on this domain. Brute-forced subdomains pointing only to wildcard IPs are flagged (WILDCARD_FILTERED).
empty.title: No results yet
empty.body: Enter a domain above and click Start Scan.
err.busy: A scan is running. Cancel it before starting a new one.
dialog.consent.title: Authorization Confirmation - Full Mode
dialog.consent.body: Full mode performs active techniques (DNS brute force, HTTP/HTTPS checks) against the target. Do this ONLY on domains you own or have written permission to test.
dialog.consent.check: I am authorized to scan this domain.
dialog.about.body:
Abilithic Recon v{version}
Attack Surface Intelligence Engine

Public sources, no API keys. For authorized & educational use.
MIT License. (c) Abilithic.
disclaimer.text: Abilithic Recon is built for authorized security testing and educational use on systems/assets you own or have permission to test. Misuse is the user's responsibility.
finding.shadow.title: Shadow IT Indication
finding.shadow.detail: Live subdomain '{host}' uses a risky naming pattern ({kw}) and may be undocumented.
finding.shadow.rec: Review ownership. If unused, remove from DNS. If dev/staging, restrict access (VPN/auth).
finding.panel.title: Exposed Panel/Login
finding.panel.detail: '{host}' appears to expose a panel/login page publicly (title: {title}).
finding.panel.rec: Restrict admin panels to trusted networks and enforce strong auth + MFA.
finding.takeover.title: Subdomain Takeover Risk
finding.takeover.rec: Claim the resource on that service immediately or remove the dangling CNAME record.
finding.weaktls.title: Weak TLS Version
finding.weaktls.rec: Disable TLS 1.0/1.1 and SSLv3; require TLS 1.2 or higher.
finding.expcert.title: Expired Certificate
finding.expcert.detail: The TLS certificate for '{host}' has expired.
finding.expcert.rec: Renew/rotate the TLS certificate and automate renewal.
finding.spf.title: SPF Not Found
finding.spf.rec: Add an SPF record to reduce email spoofing risk.
finding.dmarc.title: DMARC Not Found
finding.dmarc.rec: Deploy a DMARC policy (start with p=none for monitoring, then tighten).
about.license: MIT License — public sources, no API keys.
